What's going on? So this is the offer stack and it is really, really sweet and I think you are going to dig it and it's awesome. Alright so here's how it works. Obviously we're doing a six week, 42 day type program, hit the goal and get credit towards staying. You can market this as free or not free. Either way works as long as we're just being clear that there are multiple ways that they can qualify to get it for free. Obviously satisfaction guarantee which we always offer and obviously the fact that we're going to give them an even cooler offer that if they hit the goal we're going to credit the amount of money that they're spending towards staying. After that we're doing the call to set the appointment and talk with the tone from the positioning section which I'll get to in sales which basically just positions this as an absolutely premium facility and once you go through that section you will totally understand what I'm talking about but there's a certain tonality that you will be able to express that's different than you have in the past and things that you will be able to say that you haven't been able to say like having a one on one coach that's personal to you like checking with you every day. Like that is something that we couldn't do before and now we can. So it's a 599 credit only sale with satisfaction money back guarantee. The abandoned hope sale which is going to be the halfway point sale is actually combined with the year of change and so basically we're going to use the year of change to get the 12 month commitment. And the beauty of this is that at the abandoned hope we're going to basically say hey you're paying $99 a week right now if you want to enter the year of change which obviously there's a whole script around this you're going to be able to do it for $23 less per week than you're already currently paying for. And the beautiful thing here is you see the first line is with a weight loss goal guarantee and so this is something that's new that we're introducing that is really really cool but essentially we're going to guarantee that they're going to hit their goal now you need to decide with them on what that goal is and make sure that it's realistic for you and them but you're going to guarantee that they hit that goal by the end of the year. And the guarantee is a service guarantee in that if they do not hit the goal by that time we will continue to work with them provided they continue to follow the program requirements as outlined which means purchasing the supplements that you prescribed to them and then buying the food which for now will be sending pictures of receipts and in the future will be other things. But either way those are the primary things that they're going to need to do which means that from a business standpoint they're still generating revenue for you to make sure they hit their goal. So make sure that you set a fair goal and something that they can be excited about but that is realistic that they will be able to hit and crash and hopefully hit much sooner than the 52 week mark. But the year of change comes with that weight loss goal guarantee which makes the offer significantly more compelling. The down sell there is that if they do not want to commit for the year that they can just continue and it's an AB close either you take this one which is cheaper and comes with a weight loss guarantee or you can just continue paying exactly what you're paying now which is 99 bucks a week and just continues on without any commitment. And so the big point here is that we're saying we'll commit to you if you commit to us and so that's kind of how that works. So the goal here is obviously to just close the 12 month commitment and then after that we're going to go for the prepaid year of change. So we're going to close the money year of change and so we're just going to recap the offer once more once they're excited because they're weighing out and just say hey if you want to save an extra thousand dollars you can just prepay for the year which drops your rate to 57 bucks a week. So I would just say a little over 50 a week and I think that will be a very compelling offer that I think a lot of people will take to save yet another thousand dollars. So if you see the price drops they're very significant and they come with bonuses and so at the very least you'll have most people at 70, 77 a week and you'll have some people probably 20% who take the prepaid offer which actually is pretty momentous in terms of how much you're making per customer. So here's the math behind how that works. If you're having a 599 credit only challenge and 20% take the $3,000 paid in full on the backside and 90% take at least a $200 supplement bundle which you can have built into your original contract and 100% stay on it because they should because they're one on one coaching clients. They are not large group clients so they're going to do exactly what you prescribe to them to do and by prescribe I mean we are not medical professionals but whatever you recommend they stay on to do the program properly. And so what that equates to is $1,400 per head and upfront cash in the first six weeks which is outrageous is unbelievable and what that does is if you compare it to the old way the old way was $600 times 25% margin I didn't put the supplement piece in there but if we did then it would probably be maybe 180 but just for the sake of this example it means that if you're running a 25% margin you're making about 150 of workable margin left per sale which means that if you're converting 20% of your leads then the max you can pay per lead is about $30 and that's kind of where we find most people who work with us who haven't implemented this part that's pretty much where most of them kind of cap out is about $30 a lead and that's because this is the math behind it. Now the new way will allow you to do way way more and so let's see you run $1,400 with a 90% margin assuming maybe you have somebody to help you or you're just taking the rent out that means you're making 1250 a sale and if 20% of your leads are converted then it means you can spend up to $250 max per lead which is obviously an 8x improvement from before so it basically makes you untouchable from a marketing standpoint because this process is designed to have maximal leverage on the volume side and on the margin side so that's what makes this so powerful. And that concludes this section in Leads Naturally to Legion where I'll get into just a high level gloss over of what we need to tweak for this go round and the targeting.
